resources.string: Locus Map - Sigma Ride track export
Transferring track\n\nIf you\'re not automatically forwarded to the SIGMA RIDE app, something has gone wrong.
Error: SIGMA RIDE app not found
Error: Failed to get track data from Locus Map
Error: Failed to process track data
Error: It looks like this app wasn\'t started through Locus Map.
To export a track to SIGMA RIDE, select the track in Locus Map, tap the \"share\" icon, and select SIGMA RIDE.
